summary: Executable specification runner that turns Markdown specs into runnable tests and reports.

notes: Preferred install paths are the upstream install script, Homebrew, or `go install`.
Keep install method host-controlled instead of baking one package manager into charness.
Use the same mechanism that originally installed the binary.

detect.failure_hint: Install specdown from the upstream repo or releases page.

healthcheck.failure_hint: The binary exists but the CLI surface looks broken. Reinstall from a clean upstream release.

notes: Upstream documents Homebrew as `brew install corca-ai/tap/specdown`.

when_missing: Executable spec workflows should degrade to prose-only review or alternate test harnesses.
Do not claim spec execution or report generation succeeded without the binary.
when_version_mismatch: Treat report or adapter drift as a manual review point before trusting results.
